content.raw:
> SERVICES

Services built for growth

Three core capabilities. One mission: help you grow faster with data-driven marketing and technology.

LEVEL 01

⚡ Performance Marketing

Drive measurable results with data-backed campaigns across Google Ads, paid search, and social media.

INCLUDED

  • ▸ Google Ads Management
  • ▸ Paid Search Campaigns
  • ▸ Social Media Advertising
  • ▸ Campaign Optimization
  • ▸ A/B Testing & Experimentation
  • ▸ ROI Tracking & Reporting

WHY_IT_MATTERS

  • → Proprietary analytics for deeper insights
  • → Continuous optimization based on real data
  • → Transparent reporting on every euro spent

LEVEL 02

📊 Marketing Analytics

Get clarity on what drives growth with real conversion tracking and custom reporting dashboards.

INCLUDED

  • ▸ Conversion Tracking Setup
  • ▸ Custom Analytics Dashboards
  • ▸ Multi-Channel Attribution
  • ▸ Data Integration & Automation
  • ▸ Performance Reporting
  • ▸ Predictive Analytics

WHY_IT_MATTERS

  • → See exactly what drives conversions
  • → Make decisions based on real data, not guesses
  • → Automated reporting saves hours every week

LEVEL 03 — SWARM

🤖 AI agents and human strategists, working as one.

from €4,999/month

This is full-service performance marketing — rebuilt for the AI era.

Swarm agents monitor every channel, every keyword, every competitor signal, 24 hours a day. Velocity North strategists handle the thinking, the creative direction, and the calls that require human judgment. Together, they run your marketing with a precision no traditional agency can match — and at a transparency level most agencies actively avoid.

Everything is visible in your client portal. Every recommendation, every change, every result.

INCLUDED

  • ▸ Everything in Level 02
  • ▸ Full Google Ads & Meta Campaign Management
  • ▸ SEO & GEO Monitoring (organic + AI search visibility)
  • ▸ Dedicated Velocity North Strategist
  • ▸ Monthly Strategy Review
  • ▸ Ad Copy & Creative Direction
  • ▸ Cross-Channel Attribution (Paid, Organic, Social)
  • ▸ AI-Powered Competitor Intelligence
  • ▸ Board-Ready Reporting

WHY_IT_MATTERS

  • → The agents never sleep. Your strategist always thinks ahead.
  • → One team. Every channel. One source of truth.
  • → Built for brands serious about growth — not agencies serious about retainers.

Cancel anytime. 30-day satisfaction guarantee.

How we work

A straightforward process focused on results, not bureaucracy.

PHASE_01

🎯

Discovery

We start by understanding your business, goals, and current challenges.

PHASE_02

⚡

Strategy

Build a data-driven plan tailored to your specific growth objectives.

PHASE_03

🛡️

Execution

Implement, test, and optimize continuously for maximum impact.

> GUARANTEE

No contracts. No lock-in. No excuses.

Every tier comes with a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If we’re not delivering, you walk. We’d rather earn your business every month than hide behind a 12-month contract.

FAQ

Who is Level 01 for?

Businesses that want visibility into their marketing performance without paying for full management. Great as a starting point or for in-house teams who want a second opinion.

Who is Level 02 for?

Growth-stage companies tired of either overpaying for an agency or underperforming with in-house tools. Swarm agents do the routine work. You do the strategy.

Who is Swarm (Level 03) for?

Brands that want a world-class marketing operation without building one in-house. If you’re spending €10k+ per month on ads and not getting the visibility, speed, or results you expect — this is for you.

Let’s talk about your growth goals

Schedule a call to discuss how we can help accelerate your business.

Get in Touch →

content.raw:
> ABOUT_US

The team you bring in when you're serious about growth

We're a Nordic digital growth consultancy that combines marketing expertise with technical depth. No fluff, just results.

Why we exist

Most marketing agencies talk a good game but can't back it up with real data. Most tech consultancies understand the systems but don't get marketing.

We built Velocity North to bridge that gap. We're marketers who code and engineers who understand growth.

Based in Gothenburg and Oslo, we work with ambitious companies across the Nordics and Europe who want to grow faster without the typical agency BS.

What drives us

Results-Driven

We measure success by your growth, not vanity metrics.

Technical Excellence

Deep expertise in both marketing and technology.

Partnership Mindset

Your success is our success. We work as an extension of your team.

Who we are

PROFILE_01

Jakob Bronebakk

Co-founder & Strategy Lead

Based in Oslo. Performance marketing specialist. Founder of KTRL — the holding behind Naardic, Digtective, and Velocity North.

PROFILE_02

Yann Skaalen

Co-founder, CEO of Digtective

Based in Gothenburg. 25+ years building advertising campaigns. Founded Digtective: a cookie-free, GDPR-compliant attribution system. Core insight: 30–50% of conversions are lost due to privacy-broken tracking.

PROFILE_03

YOU!

Client Partner

Our clients' expertise about their own business is one of the most important keys to success in marketing.

150+

Clients Served

€25M+

Ad Spend Managed

3.2x

Avg. ROAS

98%

Client Retention

Want to work with us?

Get in Touch →

content.raw:
This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:

Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)

...or something like this:

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.

As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!
